subject: Photos of the office cabinets
body:
Jeffrey,

This are some of the photos for you to have an idea. As I said before, the office will be FINISHED by the end of March, assembled in a provisory way, (remember that has to be disassembled and packed.) At that time I hope to receive the hinges for the doors, we just ordered those but I spoke to the vendor and he will try his best to deliver them by that date. I think that they should be installed before we pack.The finishers will start working in about ten days, and also they told me that it has to be shipped with the finish, always can be retouched after installation in situ.
This first group of photos are moldings prepared in solid chene, and in # 5 and 6 they were inventoried according to the drawings.
There are 3 more pages to follow.




________________________________________________________________________
More new features than ever.  Check out the new AOL Mail ! - http://webmail.aol.com
body_html:
Jeffrey,
This are some of the photos for you to have an idea. As I said before, the office will be FINISHED by the end of March, assembled in a provisory way, (remember that has to be disassembled and packed.) At that time I hope to receive the hinges for the doors, we just ordered those but I spoke to the vendor and he will try his best to deliver them by that date. I think that they should be installed before we pack.The finishers will start working in about ten days, and also they told me that it has to be shipped with the finish, always can be retouched after installation in situ.
This first group of photos are moldings prepared in solid chene, and in # 5 and 6 they were inventoried according to the drawings.
There are 3 more pages to follow.
